concerns.text: FR-008 mandates implementing a 'custom online psychophysical task' to collect new data. The tasks.md file (Phase 6) only includes tasks (T034-T036) for extracting and validating *existing* data from OpenNeuro. No tasks exist to build the web app, backend API, or data collection logic required to satisfy FR-008.

User Story 4 (Priority P1) requires the system to 'provide a custom online psychophysical task' with acceptance scenarios for recording scores and linking to Study IDs. Tasks T034-T036 only cover data extraction and validation of existing records, failing to cover the implementation of the collection mechanism itself.

FR-001 requires downloading data for 'at least 50 subjects from a study cohort'. Task T012 only mentions fetching 'ds004285 data' without explicitly covering the logic to ensure the 50-subject minimum or handling the specific cohort recruitment credentials mentioned in the spec.

SC-005 requires measuring reproducibility by re-running analysis and verifying correlation coefficients match within a tolerance. While T042 runs quickstart validation, there is no specific task to implement the reproducibility check logic (re-run subset, compare coefficients, assert tolerance) required to satisfy this success criterion.

Phase 6 (User Story 4) tasks (T034-T036) are tagged [US4] but describe data extraction, not the 'custom online psychophysical task' implementation required by the spec. This indicates a stale or mismatched tag where the task description no longer matches the User Story's intent.
